sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54432" key="kataloustikoi/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατα-λουστικοί</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <sense id="n54432.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">members of a guild which performed ceremonial ablutions</tr_>, Keil-Premerstein <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Zweiter Bericht</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg003.perseus-grc1:183" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">183</biblScope> </bibl> (Lydia, <date TEIform="date">ii A. D.</date>).</sense> </entryFree>
